title: Hapalochilus quadricaudatus

intro: Hapalochilus quadricaudatus, also known as the African violet or African violetear, is a species of plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in African folk medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of malaria.
